glyph-sequence.name: Glyph Sequence
glyph-sequence.description: Arrange glyphs in the correct order to unlock a door or reveal a passage.

rune-codex.name: Rune Codex
rune-codex.description: A 3×3 grid of glyphs. Select the correct three in the correct order.

ritual-assembly.name: Ritual Assembly
ritual-assembly.description: Place ritual objects in the correct positions to complete a ceremony.

star-alignment.name: Star Alignment
star-alignment.description: Rotate constellation rings to align glyph-stars with their anchors.

decode-transcribe.name: Decode & Transcribe
decode-transcribe.description: Read a wall inscription and transcribe the hidden message using glyph buttons.
